_meta.description: Master skill registry. Plug-and-play: add new skills here + SkillNameSchema + class options.
_meta.tierCostsDescription: SP cost to advance TO this tier (cumulative total = sum of all)
_meta.levelGatesDescription: Minimum character level required to reach this tier
_meta.tierMultipliersDescription: Proficiency bonus multiplier at this tier (0=none, 1=single, 2=double, 3=triple)

Animal Handling.description: Calm, control, or communicate with beasts.

Arcana.description: Knowledge of magic, spells, magical items, and arcane traditions.

Athletics.description: Climbing, jumping, swimming, and feats of physical power.

Deception.description: Misleading others through words, disguise, or misdirection.

History.description: Knowledge of historical events, legends, and civilizations.

Insight.description: Reading body language, detecting lies, and understanding motives.

Intimidation.description: Influencing others through threats, hostile actions, or physical presence.

Investigation.description: Searching for clues, making deductions, and analyzing evidence.

Medicine.description: Diagnosing illness, stabilizing the dying, and tending wounds.

Nature.description: Knowledge of terrain, plants, animals, and natural phenomena.

Perception.description: Spotting, hearing, or detecting the presence of something.

Performance.description: Entertaining through music, dance, acting, or storytelling.

Persuasion.description: Influencing others through tact, social graces, or good nature.

Religion.description: Knowledge of deities, rites, prayers, and religious hierarchies.

Stealth.description: Moving silently, hiding, and avoiding detection.

Survival.description: Tracking, foraging, navigating wilderness, and predicting weather.

Unarmed Combat.description: Fighting without weapons using fists, grapples, and martial techniques.
